text: Any person who violates any provision of this article or regulation adopted pursuant thereto shall be guilty of a traffic infraction.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48
##### § 2289 — Violations

Any person who violates any provision of this article or regulation adopted pursuant thereto shall be guilty of a traffic infraction.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Any person who violates any provision of this article or regulation adopted pursuant thereto shall be guilty of a traffic infraction.
